name: Pepe's Game
description: A web-based crypto betting game based on meme character Pepe. Converted Figma designs and workflows into components and methods.
Interfaced with blockchain libraries like wagmi and ethersjs and API to provide a smooth gaming experience for users.

name: Cryptosat Simulator
description: Rebuilt a React application that simulates control of a live satellite via the Cryptosat API to match new design.
Modified other dependent projects, such as the jsconsole library, to extend theming and functionality.

name: Unprototyped Website
description: Implemented website for software development company Unprototyped from Figma designs.
Rewrote code to match new design. Integrated with Slack workspace for notifications.

name: DimPo Pred
description: Web application to predict and classify compounds as human alpha glucosidase activators/inhibitors based on chemical structure (SMILES).
Collected data, trained ML models using different algorithms and deployed in a Flask web application for compound prediction.
